name: Guard · Subject Abuse-Governance
description: Per-subject abuse-governance for a permissionless (KYC-free) substrate: a subject-account cell whose quota/rate is a verified counter+ceiling (over-ceiling refused in-band — the 402/429 shape) and whose account STANDING (good/flagged/suspended) is a slot moved ONLY by a governance-gated, receipted turn, never a self-write.

deos.mount: register_deos (src/lib.rs) — folds the composed DeosApp into the StarbridgeAppContext affordance registry; DeosApp::mount yields the axum router
deos.publish: Signature (the SUBJECT tier — the role that holds the account and the narrowest cap-only affordance; the account cell is a dregg:// sturdyref the subject reacquires at its own tier)

affordances.view: cap-only, Signature (a SUBJECT reads its standing / budget)
affordances.consume: GATED (cap∧state), Signature — budget-remaining precondition (consumed < ceiling); the fire submits the FULL counter-advancing turn (reading live consumed), the executor re-enforcing the installed Cases program (FieldLteField(consumed<=ceiling) + Monotonic(consumed))
affordances.set_standing: cap-only, None/root (the GOVERNANCE tier) — the executor additionally gates the submitted turn on SenderAuthorized(PublicRoot(GOVERNANCE_ROOT_SLOT)); moved through the witnessed build_set_standing_action

deos.seam: CLOSED — the fire runs against the seeded account cell carrying the FULL Cases program (WriteOnce ceiling/governance-root/subject + FieldLteField(consumed<=ceiling) + the consume_quota-scoped Monotonic(consumed)/Immutable(standing) + the set_standing-scoped SenderAuthorized/Immutable(consumed)), so an OVER-CEILING consume (the 402/429 shape), a COUNTER REWIND (Monotonic), a STANDING SELF-WRITE via consume (Immutable), and a non-governance set_standing (SenderAuthorized STARK) all BITE on the real executor-submission path (tests/factory_birth.rs, tests/governance_executor.rs)

reuses.counter_ceiling: starbridge-tool-access-delegation (the verified Monotonic(counter) + FieldLteField(counter <= ceiling) pair; deleg_admit pins the differential)
reuses.ceiling_cell: cell/src/allowance.rs (the per-subject ceiling sealed into a cell's commitment)
